State 4 conflicts: 1 shift/reduce


Grammar

    0 $accept: S $end

    1 S: "a" A "a"
    2  | "b" A "b"

    3 A: "a"
    4  | "a" "a"


Terminals, with rules where they appear

    $end (0) 0
    error (256)
    "a" (258) 1 3 4
    "b" (259) 2


Nonterminals, with rules where they appear

    $accept (5)
        on left: 0
    S (6)
        on left: 1 2
        on right: 0
    A (7)
        on left: 3 4
        on right: 1 2


State 0

    0 $accept: • S $end

    "a"  shift, and go to state 1
    "b"  shift, and go to state 2

    S  go to state 3


State 1

    1 S: "a" • A "a"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 4

    A  go to state 5


State 2

    2 S: "b" • A "b"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 11

    A  go to state 6


State 3

    0 $accept: S • $end

    $end  shift, and go to state 7


State 4

    3 A: "a" •
    4  | "a" • "a"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 8

    "a"  [reduce using rule 3 (A)]


State 5

    1 S: "a" A • "a"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 9


State 6

    2 S: "b" A • "b"

    "b"  shift, and go to state 10


State 7

    0 $accept: S $end •

    $default  accept


State 8

    4 A: "a" "a" •

    $default  reduce using rule 4 (A)


State 9

    1 S: "a" A "a" •

    $default  reduce using rule 1 (S)


State 10

    2 S: "b" A "b" •

    $default  reduce using rule 2 (S)


State 11

    3 A: "a" •
    4  | "a" • "a"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 8

    $default  reduce using rule 3 (A)
